overall.description: First-person exploration of a gothic magical classroom featuring a massive suspended dragon skeleton, wooden benches, and magical artifacts. The player character walks through the hall, observes an NPC professor, examines displays, and ascends a spiral staircase to an upper balcony.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic classroom hall with suspended dragon skeleton

events.description: first-person view entering the defense against dark arts classroom
approaching the professor NPC standing near the display case

agents.ego_description: walking through the classroom hall toward the right side, approaching the professor standing by the display

notable_agents.action: professor in dark robes standing still near a display case with a skull

entered.detail: massive bone skeleton of a dragon hanging from the ceiling
rows of wooden student benches arranged in the hall
tall stone walls with gothic arches
large stained glass windows letting in natural light
tall wooden case with skull on top

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view of a grand gothic classroom hall. The camera walks forward toward the right side of the room, approaching a professor NPC standing near a display case. The massive dragon skeleton hangs prominently in the center background, while wooden benches line the floor and iron chandeliers hang from the high ceiling.

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the dragon skeleton hanging from ceiling
camera pans left to follow the length of the skeleton

agents.ego_description: looking up at the dragon skeleton and panning around to view its full length

entered.detail: exposed wooden ceiling beams and rafters

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to examine the massive dragon skeleton suspended from the ceiling, revealing the intricate bone structure and wooden ceiling beams above. The professor and display case pass out of view as the camera pans left to follow the full length of the skeleton, showcasing the scale of the creature compared to the chandeliers and benches below.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear of classroom with display cases

events.description: approaching the back corner with spiral staircase and eyeball displays
moving closer to the three eyeball telescope displays

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the hall examining the magical displays and staircase

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the back wall

entered.detail: stone spiral staircase with wooden railing
three black spherical objects on stands resembling eyeballs
tall wooden cabinets with glass doors
various clocks mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the back left of the hall, passing rows of benches to approach a spiral staircase and unique magical displays. The three eyeball telescopes come into view near wooden bookcases, while the dragon skeleton moves to the left background. A distant figure stands near the back wall as the camera explores this corner of the classroom.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase ascending to upper level

events.description: beginning to ascend the spiral staircase
reaching upper level and viewing the hall from above

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral staircase and looking down at the classroom from the balcony

entered.detail: wooden railing of the upper balcony

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the spiral staircase, passing wall-mounted clocks and wooden bookcases. Upon reaching the upper balcony level, the view opens up to show the entire classroom hall from above, with the dragon skeleton now at eye level and the rows of benches visible far below. The perspective shift reveals the full scale of the vaulted ceiling and suspended skeleton.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a gothic classroom that transforms from a ground-level exploration into a sweeping aerial perspective of the hall. It begins by walking toward a professor standing near a display case, with wooden benches and iron chandeliers framing the path under a massive suspended dragon skeleton. As the camera tilts upward to trace the intricate bone structure of the skeleton against the wooden ceiling beams, the view pans left to emphasize the creature's immense scale. The movement then shifts toward the back of the hall, passing rows of benches and eyeball telescopes near wooden bookcases before approaching a spiral staircase. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs past wall-mounted clocks to reach an upper balcony, where the perspective opens up to reveal the entire vaulted classroom with the dragon skeleton now at eye level.
